extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won his second consecutive sprint in chaotic finale with crashes eliminating Jakobsen and Bennett inside final 3km.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin brought Philipsen through middle traffic while others crashed, suggesting positioning deeper in bunch reduces crash risk.
No breakaway attacks until after intermediate sprint shows teams won't waste energy chasing KOM points without GC incentive.
Wrong turn at roundabout by Welsford entering circuit reveals reconnaissance failures cost sprint opportunities on technical finishes.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: back-to-back sprint wins with superior positioning strategy suggests 2023 form peak, now 70-point green jersey lead
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: half-wheel defeat shows form returning after finishing second to Philipsen despite late chaos
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: crashed out of sprint contention before final 3km barrier, pattern of positioning errors emerging
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: fourth place finish suggests legs present but team leadout inferior to Alpecin structure
rider_signals.WELSFORD Sam: negative: navigational error at circuit entry indicates poor course reconnaissance eliminated sprint chance
